chief_complaint: A 47-year-old Han man presented with atypical chest pain and syncope.
history: The patient had atypical chest pain and syncope. Cardiac tumors are relatively uncommon, with myxoma being the most prevalent. Atrial septal paraganglioma is a significantly rarer form of malignant cardiac tumor that secretes catecholamines.
exam: No specific physical examination findings were reported.
labs: Imaging examination revealed a mass (3.6 cm x 2.9 cm) in the left atrium, initially suspected to be a myxoma.
